feedItems.description: allocated £62.8m to Children's Social Care (≈£281 per resident)
allocated £83.5m to Adult Social Care (≈£373 per resident)
allocated £12.3m to Public Health (≈£55 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £103 (4.9%) to £2186
